title: Mirror Items from different Boards if Status change
excerpt:
Hello Monday Community :smiley: 
I hope i get help here! =) 
Is the following Automation possible? 
We have 4 Boards with the same Groups and Colums 
Board 1: Location A 
Board 2: Location B 
Board 3: Location C 
Board 4…

posts.author: Manni (Manfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday Community

I hope i get help here! =)
Is the following Automation possible?

We have 4 Boards with the same Groups and Colums
Board 1: Location A
Board 2: Location B
Board 3: Location C
Board 4: Location Orders A,B,C

An Item in Boards 1,2or3 get marked with the Status “Order”
Now I want an automataion:

If an Item changes Status, in Board 1,2 or 3, to “Order” then the Item get mirrored in Board 4.
So that changes to that item in Board 4 applys to Board 1,2 or 3

Is that possible?

Thank you all for helping!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Manni

If I’m understanding you request correctly, yes. I believe it is possible.

Here is the approach I would take…

First, on board 4 create a SINGLE column connecting to ALL boards 1, 2 & 3. Make sure to select the “create a two-way connection” box.

Second, delete most/all of the data columns on board 4, replacing them mirror columns, using the previously created connect boards column.

Finally, add this automation to boards 1, 2 & 3.

QED, Bob’s your uncle, easy-peasy lemon squeezy and all that.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
Watch Our Latest Video: Column Total in monday.com Formulas? YES!!!
